mapper.select: SELECT t.task_id, t.email, t.owner_type, t.category_id, t.title, t.content, t.status, t.start_at, t.end_at, t.client_company, t.budget, t.paid_at, t.auto_registered, t.auto_registered_source FROM task t INNER JOIN category c ON c.category_id = t.category_id WHERE t.email = #{email} AND t.owner_type = #{ownerType} AND c.email = #{email} AND c.owner_type = #{ownerType} ORDER BY t.start_at ASC, t.task_id ASC

SELECT t.task_id, t.email, t.owner_type, t.category_id, t.title, t.content, t.status, t.start_at, t.end_at, t.client_company, t.budget, t.paid_at, t.auto_registered, t.auto_registered_source FROM task t INNER JOIN category c ON c.category_id = t.category_id WHERE t.email = #{email} AND t.owner_type = #{ownerType} AND t.category_id = #{categoryId} AND c.email = #{email} AND c.owner_type = #{ownerType} ORDER BY t.start_at ASC, t.task_id ASC

SELECT t.task_id, t.email, t.owner_type, t.category_id, t.title, t.content, t.status, t.start_at, t.end_at, t.client_company, t.budget, t.paid_at, t.auto_registered, t.auto_registered_source FROM task t INNER JOIN category c ON c.category_id = t.category_id WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId} AND t.email = #{email} AND t.owner_type = #{ownerType} AND c.email = #{email} AND c.owner_type = #{ownerType}
SELECT t.email FROM task t INNER JOIN category c ON c.category_id = t.category_id WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId} AND t.email = c.email AND t.owner_type = c.owner_type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task ( email, owner_type, category_id, title, content, status, start_at, end_at, client_company, budget, paid_at, auto_registered, auto_registered_source ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{ownerType}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{clientCompany}, #{budget}, #{paidAt}, #{autoRegistered}, #{autoRegisteredSource} )
mapper.select: SELECT task_id, email, owner_type, category_id, title, content, status, start_at, end_at, client_company, budget, paid_at, auto_registered, auto_registered_source FROM task WHERE DATE(end_at) = DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{daysUntilDeadline} DAY) AND status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY end_at ASC, task_id ASC
